data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for provider visibility of completion status.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider visibility of completion status', but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or state checks that demonstrate how this visibility is achieved. While the linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing completion percentages, it lacks concrete details or endpoints that confirm the implementation of this feature. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of how provider visibility of completion status is implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for provider dashboard implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns the expected completion status visibility for providers.
